LamBox.Empty:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Empty
    type variables:  []
      constructors:

Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Nat
    type variables:  []
      constructors:
        zero (0 arg(s))
        suc (1 arg(s))
          n : Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}

Identity.test:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}
    body: λ _ _ → @0 □
            (λ _ _ → @0 □
               (λ _ _ → @0 □
                  (λ _ _ → @0 □
                     (λ _ _ → @0 □ (λ _ _ → @0 □)
